cards.front: Second Order Linear Homogeneous Recurrence Relation
cards.back: A recurrence relation of the form: an+1 = pn * an + qn * an-1
Coefficients that do not change in the recurrence relation
Recurrence relation where there are no constant terms (qn = 0)
A polynomial equation obtained by substituting an = x^n into the homogeneous recurrence relation
Method of finding the solution using the roots of the characteristic equation
